utterance: How many shots came from the left corner?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x <= -220 AND y <= 90
notes: Left corner 3 zone: x <= -220 AND y <= 90 (tenths of feet). Verified: 382 rows live.

utterance: Only made shots from the left corner.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x <= -220 AND y <= 90 AND made_flag = 1
notes: Same zone + made_flag filter. Coreference: 'Only made' adds constraint to prior zone from Turn 1.

utterance: How many shots from the right corner?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x >= 220 AND y <= 90
notes: Right corner 3 zone: x >= 220 AND y <= 90. Verified: 394 rows live. Mirror of left corner.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x >= 220 AND y <= 90 AND made_flag = 0
notes: Turn 2 coreference: carries forward right corner zone from Turn 1; adds made_flag = 0 (missed).

utterance: How many 3-pointers were taken above the break?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE y > 90 AND distance > 22
notes: Above-the-break 3: y > 90 AND distance > 22 (feet not tenths). Verified: 2706 rows live. Critical: distance in whole feet.

utterance: How many of those were made?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE y > 90 AND distance > 22 AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: adds made_flag = 1 to above-break-3 zone from Turn 1.

utterance: How many shot attempts came from inside the restricted area?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance <= 4 OR (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190)
notes: Restricted area: distance <= 4 OR paint. Compound filter. Verified zone boundaries. Note: includes both distance-based and coordinate-based filter.

utterance: Which players had the most attempts there?
gold_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN players p ON sc.player_id = p.player_id WHERE distance <= 4 OR (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190) GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY attempts DESC
notes: Turn 2: restricted area zone carried forward; aggregated by player name via JOIN. Fixed annotation: return p.name not player_id — conversational query expects readable names.

utterance: Show me all mid-range shot attempts.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22
notes: Mid-range zone: distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 (whole feet). Verified: 1383 rows live.

utterance: What percentage of those were made?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22
notes: Turn 2: adds percentage calculation to mid-range from Turn 1. FLOAT cast prevents integer division.

utterance: How many shots were taken in the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: In-the-paint full lane: ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190. Verified: 3344 rows live. Broader than restricted area.

utterance: What was the shooting percentage in the paint compared to above the break?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as paint_pct, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 AND made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN y > 90 AND distance > 22 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as above_break_pct FROM shot_charts
notes: Two-zone FG% comparison as single-row two-column output. Fixed annotation: inline CAST/NULLIF per zone matches natural model output shape. Verified both values live.

utterance: How many corner 3s — left and right combined?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE (x <= -220 AND y <= 90) OR (x >= 220 AND y <= 90)
notes: Combined corner 3 zones via OR. Natural phrasing 'combined' triggers OR not AND. Verified: 382 + 394 = 776 total.

utterance: Break it down by left and right.
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN x <= -220 THEN 'left_corner' ELSE 'right_corner' END as corner_side, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE (x <= -220 AND y <= 90) OR (x >= 220 AND y <= 90) GROUP BY corner_side
notes: Turn 2: carries forward combined corner zone; adds CASE WHEN breakdown by side. GROUP BY pattern.

utterance: Were there any shots taken beyond 30 feet?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance > 30
notes: Deep 3 / half-court attempt filter. Distance in whole feet. No zone name in schema — raw distance filter used.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 25 AND 30
notes: Turn 2: narrows distance range from Turn 1 (>30). BETWEEN used for bounded range query.

utterance: How many shots were attempted outside the paint but inside the 3-point line?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 8 AND 22 AND NOT (ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190)
notes: Classic mid-range exclusion: BETWEEN 8 AND 22 feet but NOT in the paint. Two-zone compound filter. Phrasing 'inside the 3-point line' maps to distance < 22.

utterance: How many of Jayson Tatum's shots in Q4 came from the paint?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') AND period = 4 AND ABS(x) <= 80 AND y <= 190
notes: Three-way filter: spatial zone (paint), player subquery, temporal (period = 4). Name resolution via ILIKE for fuzzy match.
